languages.text: "Свобода... менять судьбу?" {n}Проктор повторяет медленно, с интонацией полного неверия в происходящее.{/n} "Даже ты, вырожденец, должен знать — каждый человек от рождения имеет свое место в замысле Бога-Императора, и любая попытка изменить это положение — нарушение законов Его!"

"Freedom... to change destiny?" {n}Solomorne repeats slowly, with an undertone of utter disbelief at what he is hearing.{/n} "Even you, a degenerate, should know that everyone has their place in the God-Emperor's plan from birth, and that any attempt to change that is a violation of His will!"
languages.original_text: "Свобода... менять судьбу?" {n}Проктор повторяет медленно, с интонацией полного неверия в происходящее.{/n} "Даже ты, вырожденец, должен знать — каждый человек от рождения имеет свое место в замысле Бога-Императора, и любая попытка изменить это положение — нарушение законов Его!"

traits.locale_text: "Freedom... To change destiny?" {n}The Proctor repeats slowly, with an undertone of utter disbelief at what he is hearing.{/n} "Even you, a degenerate, should know that every man has his place in the God-Emperor's plan from birth, and an attempt to change that is a violation of His will!"

"Freedom... To change destiny?" {n}The Proctor repeats slowly, with an undertone of utter disbelief at what he is hearing.{/n} "Even you, a degenerate, should know that every man has his place in the God-Emperor's plan from birth, and an attempt to change that is a violation of His will!"

"Freedom... To change destiny?" {n}The Proctor repeats slowly, with an undertone of utter disbelief at what he is hearing.{/n} "Even you, a degenerate, should know that every man has his place in the God-Emperor's plan from birth, and that any attempt to change that is a violation of His will!"

"Freedom... To change destiny?" {n}The Proctor repeats slowly, with an undertone of utter disbelief at what he is hearing.{/n} "Even you, a degenerate, should know that every man has his place in the God-Emperor's plan from birth, and that any attempt to change that is a violation of His will!"

"Freedom... to change destiny?" {n}Solomorne repeats slowly, with an undertone of utter disbelief at what he is hearing.{/n} "Even you, a degenerate, should know that everyone has their place in the God-Emperor's plan from birth, and that any attempt to change that is a violation of His will!"

"Freedom... to change destiny?" {n}Solomorne repeats slowly, with an undertone of utter disbelief at what he is hearing.{/n} "Even you, a degenerate, should know that everyone has their place in the God-Emperor's plan from birth, and that any attempt to change that is a violation of His will!"

languages.text: “改变命运……的自由？”{n}索罗蒙以难以置信的语气，慢慢重复了一遍这句话，仿佛不敢相信自己听到的一切。{/n}“即便是你，这个堕落的恶棍，也应该知道——每个人在诞生之初，就已经被神皇安排好了一切。若是有谁打算改变自己的命运，就是在忤逆祂的意志！”
languages.original_text: "Freedom... to change destiny?" {n}Solomorne repeats slowly, with an undertone of utter disbelief at what he is hearing.{/n} "Even you, a degenerate, should know that everyone has their place in the God-Emperor's plan from birth, and that any attempt to change that is a violation of His will!"

traits.locale_text: “改变命运……的自由？”{n}索罗蒙以难以置信的语气，慢慢重复了一遍这句话，仿佛不敢相信自己听到的一切。{/n}“即便是你，这个堕落的恶棍，也应该知道——每个人在诞生之初，就已经被神皇安排好了一切。若是有谁打算改变自己的命运，就是在忤逆祂的意志！”

languages.text: «¿Libres... para cambiar su destino?», {n}repite Solomorne muy despacio, sin poder dar crédito a lo que está oyendo.{/n} «¡Incluso tú, un degenerado, deberías saber que todos tenemos un papel que cumplir en el plan del Dios Emperador desde el momento en que nacemos, y que cualquier intento por cambiar ese destino supone una violación de Su ley!».
languages.original_text: "Freedom... to change destiny?" {n}Solomorne repeats slowly, with an undertone of utter disbelief at what he is hearing.{/n} "Even you, a degenerate, should know that everyone has their place in the God-Emperor's plan from birth, and that any attempt to change that is a violation of His will!"

traits.locale_text: «¿Libres... para cambiar su destino?», {n}repite Solomorne muy despacio, sin poder dar crédito a lo que está oyendo.{/n} «¡Incluso tú, un degenerado, deberías saber que todos tenemos un papel que cumplir en el plan del Dios Emperador desde el momento en que nacemos, y que cualquier intento por cambiar ese destino supone una violación de Su ley!».

languages.text: "Kaderi değiştirme özgürlüğü mü?" {n}Solomorne, bu duyduklarını pek de inanamadığını gösteren bir şekilde tekrarlıyor.{/n} "Senin gibi yozlaşmış biri bile herkesin doğuştan Tanrı İmparator'un planında bir yeri olduğunu ve bunu değiştirme girişiminin O'nun iradesinin ihlali olduğunu bilmeli!"
languages.original_text: "Freedom... to change destiny?" {n}Solomorne repeats slowly, with an undertone of utter disbelief at what he is hearing.{/n} "Even you, a degenerate, should know that everyone has their place in the God-Emperor's plan from birth, and that any attempt to change that is a violation of His will!"

traits.locale_text: "Kaderi değiştirme özgürlüğü mü?" {n}Solomorne, bu duyduklarını pek de inanamadığını gösteren bir şekilde tekrarlıyor.{/n} "Senin gibi yozlaşmış biri bile herkesin doğuştan Tanrı İmparator'un planında bir yeri olduğunu ve bunu değiştirme girişiminin O'nun iradesinin ihlali olduğunu bilmeli!"

languages.text: 「運命を変える自由…？」{n}ソロモーンは、聞いていることをまったく信じないという様子の低い声でゆっくりと繰り返す。{/n}「たとえ、お前が堕落した人であっても、すべての者が生まれた時から神帝陛下の計画の中に居場所を持っているということを知るべきであり、それを変えようとするいかなる試みも陛下の意志に反する行為だ！」
languages.original_text: "Freedom... to change destiny?" {n}Solomorne repeats slowly, with an undertone of utter disbelief at what he is hearing.{/n} "Even you, a degenerate, should know that everyone has their place in the God-Emperor's plan from birth, and that any attempt to change that is a violation of His will!"

traits.locale_text: 「運命を変える自由…？」{n}ソロモーンは、聞いていることをまったく信じないという様子の低い声でゆっくりと繰り返す。{/n}「たとえ、お前が堕落した人であっても、すべての者が生まれた時から神帝陛下の計画の中に居場所を持っているということを知るべきであり、それを変えようとするいかなる試みも陛下の意志に反する行為だ！」

languages.text: « La liberté... de changer son destin ? {n}Solomorne répète lentement les propos de votre vis-à-vis, sans cacher son incrédulité devant un tel discours.{/n} Même un dégénéré tel que vous devrait savoir que chacun d'entre nous a dès la naissance sa place attitrée dans le grand dessein de l'Empereur-Dieu, et que toute tentative pour s'y soustraire est un outrage à Sa volonté ! »
languages.original_text: "Freedom... to change destiny?" {n}Solomorne repeats slowly, with an undertone of utter disbelief at what he is hearing.{/n} "Even you, a degenerate, should know that everyone has their place in the God-Emperor's plan from birth, and that any attempt to change that is a violation of His will!"

traits.locale_text: « La liberté... de changer son destin ? {n}Solomorne répète lentement les propos de votre vis-à-vis, sans cacher son incrédulité devant un tel discours.{/n} Même un dégénéré tel que vous devrait savoir que chacun d'entre nous a dès la naissance sa place attitrée dans le grand dessein de l'Empereur-Dieu, et que toute tentative pour s'y soustraire est un outrage à Sa volonté ! »

languages.text: "Die Freiheit ... das Schicksal zu verändern?" {n} wiederholt Solomorne langsam und mit einem ungläubigen Unterton.{/n} "Selbst Ihr, ein Degenerierter, sollte doch wissen, dass jeder von Geburt an seinen Platz im Plan des Gottimperators hat, und dass jeder Versuch, das zu ändern, eine Verletzung seines Willens ist!"
languages.original_text: "Freedom... to change destiny?" {n}Solomorne repeats slowly, with an undertone of utter disbelief at what he is hearing.{/n} "Even you, a degenerate, should know that everyone has their place in the God-Emperor's plan from birth, and that any attempt to change that is a violation of His will!"

traits.locale_text: "Die Freiheit ... das Schicksal zu verändern?" {n} wiederholt Solomorne langsam und mit einem ungläubigen Unterton.{/n} "Selbst Ihr, ein Degenerierter, sollte doch wissen, dass jeder von Geburt an seinen Platz im Plan des Gottimperators hat, und dass jeder Versuch, das zu ändern, eine Verletzung seines Willens ist!"
